title: BatPack
body:
The BatPack is a vanilla+ modpack based around the Vulkan mod for our friend group.
The intent is to have a simple mostly vanilla-like experience with QOL improvements and more options for decoration and adventure with some optimization mods thrown in for good measure.

Not included but intended to be played with this datapack:
-   [New in Town](https://modrinth.com/datapack/new-in-town) - Millenare/Minecolonies but in a datapack

Mods
<details>
<summary>Optimization</summary>

[Alternate Current](https://modrinth.com/mod/alternate-current) - Redstone overhaul

[Better Beds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-beds) - Block models instead of entity renders
  
[C2ME](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2m3-fabric), [Lithostitched](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithostitched), [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium) - World gen optimization mods
  
[Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify) - Assorted bug fixes and a nice privacy change

[Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - Hides unseen tiles/entities

[FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - Memory usage optimization
  
[Scalable Lux](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux): Light engine changes for performance and error fixes
  
[Tweaks for Audio Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/audio-engine-tweaks) - audio engine changes "to avoid overloading"

[VulkanMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod) - Makes Minecraft use Vulkan instead of OpenGL
</details>

<details>
<summary>Adventure</summary>

[Armored Elytra](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-armor)

[Basic Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/basicweapons)

Formations: [Overworld](https://modrinth.com/mod/formations-overworld) and [Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/formations-nether) - most vanilla-friendly structures mod I found

[Infinity Cave](https://modrinth.com/mod/infinity-cave) - Roguelike cave system underneath bedrock level with custom mob spawns.

[JourneyMap](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap) - Good map mod

[Lootr](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootr) - Instanced loot so everybody can get some

[RPG Style Player Stat Progression/Levels](https://modrinth.com/mod/player-stat-progression) - Get better at what you do

[Wraith Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/fwaystones) - Simple/effective teleport/waystone mod with personal teleport item options
</details>

<details>
<summary>Building</summary>

[Areas](https://modrinth.com/mod/areas) - Named areas with configurable range and color

[Beacon Flight](https://modrinth.com/mod/beacon-flight) - A balanced version of attainable creative flight for big builds

[Better Hanging Signs](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-hanging-signs) - More immersive decorative signs

[Better Stoneworking](https://modrinth.com/datapack/improved-stone-smelting) - Adds nice to have stonecutter recipes and allows smelting stairs and slabs (cobble->stone->smooth, sandstone->smooth, red sandstone->smooth red)

[Block Runner](https://modrinth.com/mod/block-runner) - Paths have a purpose now :) 

[Bridging Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/bridging-mod) - Helpful

[Building Wands](https://modrinth.com/mod/building-wands) - Very nice building tool

Diagonal [Fences](https://modrinth.com/mod/diagonal-fences), [Walls](https://modrinth.com/mod/diagonal-walls), and [Windows](https://modrinth.com/mod/diagonal-windows)

[Double Doors](https://modrinth.com/mod/double-doors) - Make double doors/trapdoors function as one

[ElevatorMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/elevatormod) - Simple and effective elevator, can be concealed, camouflaged, or colored

[FurniCraft](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ketkets-furnicraft) - Nice vanilla style furniture

[Stoneworks](https://modrinth.com/mod/stoneworks) - More vanilla style decorative blocks but not an obnoxiously unusable amount

[Vanilla Shutters](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla-shutters) - Sideways trapdoors essentially

</details>
<details>
<summary>Tech/Magic</summary>

[Auto Harvest](https://modrinth.com/datapack/auto-harvest) - Automated farms
  
[Easy Mob Farm](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-mob-farm) - Generate mob loot without needed to setup a laggy farm

[Enchanting Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchanting-reimagined) - Better than vanilla enchanting system, featuring smelt down useless books into dust to save storage space

[Extended Drawers](https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-drawers) - Bulk storage with nice utility qol upgrades (locking, voiding, compacting)

[Mining Quarries](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mining-quarries) - Get ores without having to go generate more chunks

[Minium Stone](https://modrinth.com/mod/minium-stone) - Transmute common blocks into rarer alternatives for hard to find things

[Packed Up (Backpacks)](https://modrinth.com/mod/packed-up-backpacks) - Simple backpack

[Potted Farms](https://modrinth.com/datapack/potted-farms) - Tree farm

[Random Misfits](https://modrinth.com/mod/random-misfits) - Paxels, hammers, excavators, glass cutter, repair kits, portable crafting table

[Short Circuit](https://modrinth.com/mod/short-circuit) - Redstone in a block

[Simple Copper Pipes](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-copper-pipes) - Simple transport pipes

[Toms Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage) - Linked storage 

[Usefulfood Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/usefulfood-reborn) - More foods but not too much
</details>

<details>
<summary>QOL</summary>

[AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - Useful food HUD changes

[Better Enchantment Order](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-enchantment-order) - Better ordered enchantments on items

[BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) - More readable F3 with included config for reasonable info

[Better Than Mending](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-than-mending) - Can spend XP you already have to repair mending items

[Carry On](https://modrinth.com/mod/carry-on) - Pick up and move chests without needing to worry about inventory space

[Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling) - Search for controls in keybind menu

[Cut Through](https://modrinth.com/mod/cut-through) - Stab the monsters not the grass

[Extreme Sound Muffler](https://modrinth.com/mod/extreme_sound_muffler) - For when enderman can't die quietly...

[Graves](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ketket-graves) - Keep inventory but balanced-ish

[KISS](https://modrinth.com/mod/kiss) - Inventory sorting mod

[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - Search mods and change configs in-game if available

[Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks) - Better mouse functionality/usablity

[Open Parties and Claims](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-parties-and-claims) - Party up, claim chunks, force load chunks

[Roughly Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) - JEI type mod that mostly works in vulkan, craft support is broken on a crafting table (intend to replace with EMI when it gets updated)

[Tree Harvester](https://modrinth.com/mod/tree-harvester) - Chop down whole tree with axe

[Wool Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/wool-tweaks) - Dye wool/wool-related blocks in world, craft wool into 4 string, dye already dyed wool

[WTHIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/wthit) - Answers the question: What am I looking at?
</details>
